name: FounderSkies
patterns: Without/With ❌✅ problem-mirror block above the fold
3-step numbered signup flow with time estimate (5 minutes)
Persona split at signup (SaaS founders vs Agency/Consultants)
Metric-specific outcome attribution in testimonials (↑ 4 inbound leads in first month)
Profile as compounding lead asset framing (24/7 lead capture)
Knowledge Base as AI voice training — positions AI personalization vs generic ChatGPT
notes: Well-structured SaaS landing page. Without/With block is the killer pattern — directly mirrors ICP pain. Testimonials use metric attribution not fluffy quotes. Persona mode split reduces friction for both audiences. Pricing FAQ gated (need signup to see). Different vertical (LinkedIn content vs ad conversion) but same ICP: founders bleeding on paid acquisition.
actions_taken: Added Without/With block (❌/✅ 2-column dark card) above AUDIT FORM in index.html — mirrors ad-wasting founder pain before they reach the form
